title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, list and delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same feature parity as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat, model management, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Lightweight RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust CLI for chatting, pulling and benchmarking Ollama models with progress bars.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset to use Ollama models in production retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes for function-calling, vision, fine-tuning and Docker Compose stacks.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node to invoke Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial async Rust crate for Ollama REST API with serde models.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Minimal Streamlit chat UI that streams Ollama responses with session memory.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that chats with any Ollama model privately.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord.py bot bringing Ollama models to Discord threads with slash commands.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer-backed connection pooling.

title: ollama-go
summary: Community Go SDK generated from OpenAPI specs; compatible with oapi-codegen.
